category_sources: Official DWARF page describes libdwarf/dwarfdump for compiler/debugger DWARF information.
source_facts.description: "Dump and produce DWARF debug information in ELF objects".
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://www.prevanders.net/dwarf.html uses libdwarf and dwarfdump as the project names.
source_facts.name is dwarfutils, the Homebrew formula name.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the project overview and build/download documentation.
Official homepage links to the libdwarf API documentation at https://www.prevanders.net/libdwarfdoc/.
repo_sources: Official homepage states anonymous git access for libdwarf/dwarfdump source via https://github.com/davea42/libdwarf-code.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes dwarfdump as a command-line tool for readable DWARF data.
source_facts.description identifies DWARF debug information and ELF objects.
